Name: NPC_GENERATE_PARAM
Description: Defines generated NPC appearance, body type, equipment loadout, and character customization settings.

Fields.Name: Character ID
Fields.Description: References the base character definition used for the NPC.

Fields.Name: Gender
Fields.Description: Specifies the NPC's gender.

Fields.Name: Body Type
Fields.Description: Determines the NPC's body size or physique variation.

Fields.Name: Human/Hollow State
Fields.Description: Specifies whether the NPC appears human or hollow/undead.

Fields.Name: Equipment Type
Fields.Description: Defines the NPC's equipment configuration category.

Fields.Name: Face Type
Fields.Description: Specifies the facial structure or face generation category.

Fields.Name: Skin Number
Fields.Description: Selects the skin texture variation.

Fields.Name: Face Preset Number
Fields.Description: References a predefined face customization preset.

Fields.Name: Dummy
Fields.Description: Unused placeholder field.

Fields.Name: Skin Red
Fields.Description: Red color component for skin tone customization.

Fields.Name: Skin Green
Fields.Description: Green color component for skin tone customization.

Fields.Name: Skin Blue
Fields.Description: Blue color component for skin tone customization.

Fields.Name: Face ID
Fields.Description: References the face model or face data entry.

Fields.Name: Left-Hand Weapon 1
Fields.Description: Primary weapon equipped in the left-hand slot.

Fields.Name: Left-Hand Weapon 2
Fields.Description: Secondary weapon equipped in the left-hand slot.

Fields.Name: Left-Hand Weapon 3
Fields.Description: Tertiary weapon equipped in the left-hand slot.

Fields.Name: Right-Hand Weapon 1
Fields.Description: Primary weapon equipped in the right-hand slot.

Fields.Name: Right-Hand Weapon 2
Fields.Description: Secondary weapon equipped in the right-hand slot.

Fields.Name: Right-Hand Weapon 3
Fields.Description: Tertiary weapon equipped in the right-hand slot.

Fields.Name: Helmet
Fields.Description: Head armor equipped by the NPC.

Fields.Name: Armor
Fields.Description: Body armor equipped by the NPC.

Fields.Name: Gauntlets
Fields.Description: Arm armor equipped by the NPC.

Fields.Name: Leggings
Fields.Description: Leg armor equipped by the NPC.

Fields.Name: Quiver
Fields.Description: Quiver or ammunition holder equipped by the NPC.

Fields.Name: Arrow
Fields.Description: Arrow or ammunition item equipped by the NPC.
